caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, a gold chain, a gold watch, and a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering. He sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm, looking toward someone off-screen and smiling slightly. In the background, a white banner displays the phrase "UNICORN MUSTLE" alongside stars. To his right, a blue screen reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a black mug sits on the desk with "BOSS TALK" written on it. A small logo featuring a question mark and the word "BOSS" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a static position, maintaining his expression and posture while glancing slightly to the side, with no significant movement or change in the environment.
